title: Student Conduct: Prohibited Organizations and Hazing
description: Conroe ISD prohibits students from participating in gangs, secret clubs, or any unauthorized organizations that operate in connection with the school. The district also strictly forbids hazing — any activity that humiliates, endangers, or mistreats students as part of joining or belonging to a group, even if a student appears to consent. Parents and students should know that participation in these activities can result in serious disciplinary consequences.
